summary: Send the full raw browser cookie jar to mobbin.com/api endpoints instead of no/partial cookie.
reason: The templated client left the cookie-auth request header a no-op (nil jar), so mobbin.com/api returned 200 with an unauthenticated body. The stored CookieCredential holds the whole name=val jar (incl. split sb-auth-token.0/.1); it must be set verbatim as the Cookie header for mobbin.com, while the Supabase branch overrides with the reassembled Bearer + apikey.
validated_outcome: collections/autocomplete/screens/flows all authenticate live after the fix.
